findings.issue: Synthesis request sends 14000 char slice of combined data but no pagination — could truncate critical trader profiles mid-sentence
findings.suggestion: Implement chunked synthesis with multiple API calls, or use text summarization before the final synthesis call to preserve full context
findings.est_impact: Lost trader methodology data, incomplete SIENNA_PROFILE.md output

findings.issue: Haiku model loops up to 12 chunks per file with 400ms delay between calls — no batching or concurrent requests
findings.suggestion: Use Promise.all() to parallelize requests (respecting rate limits), or batch chunks into single larger requests
findings.est_impact: Slow analysis, high API costs, unnecessary latency

findings.issue: POST /score-signal slices profile to 1500 chars without warning — may cut off critical trader context needed for scoring
findings.suggestion: Load full profile or add logging when truncation occurs; consider separate endpoint for large profiles
findings.est_impact: Inaccurate signal scoring against incomplete trader model

findings.issue: loadAllHistorySignals() filters insights for 'NO_ACTIONABLE' string but this string is never set by analysis endpoints
findings.suggestion: Remove 'NO_ACTIONABLE' check or ensure consistency across where insights are generated
